metadata.title: Self Distiller
metadata.description: Distill your authentic voice into a trainable Self Model.

login.title: Self Distiller
login.subtitle: Sign in to your workspace.
login.invalid: That email can’t sign in here, or the link couldn’t be sent.
login.checkEmail: Check your email for a sign-in link.
login.magicHint: We’ll email you a one-time magic link — no password needed.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: {project} · Self Model version {version}
dashboard.noProjectFound: No project found. Run pnpm db:seed or create one.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: LLM provider, model, and credentials.
settings.testDescription: Makes one real structured LLM call using your default provider and a saved credential.
settings.testSuccess: ✓ Success — structured LLM call returned valid JSON.

appearance.title: Appearance & Language
appearance.subtitle: Theme and panel language. Saved for this account.

import.title: Import
import.createProjectFirst: Create a project first (see Contexts), then import materials here.
import.subtitle: Paste or upload historical materials, extract evidence, and generate Self Model v0.1.
import.contentPlaceholder: Paste chat samples, copy, ChatGPT excerpts, etc.
import.generateFromAccepted: Generate / update Self Model from accepted
import.pasteFirst: Paste or upload some text first.
import.acceptAtLeastOne: Accept at least one evidence item.
import.alreadyImported: This content was already imported — skipped {count} duplicate{plural}. Nothing new to analyze.
import.createdManyChunks: Created {created} materials from this text (it was large){dupNote}. Analyzing the first…

googleChat.title: Import from Google Chat (Takeout)
googleChat.description: Upload one or more messages.json files from your Google Chat Takeout export. We list the participants so you can mark which one is you — only your lines become your style signal.
googleChat.chooseFilesFirst: Choose one or more messages.json files first.
googleChat.noConversations: No conversations with text were found in those files.
googleChat.foundConversations: Found {conversations} conversation(s) — will create about {materials} material(s) (large conversations are split into chunks). Which participant is you?

interview.title: Interview Studio
interview.createProjectFirst: Create a project first (see Contexts), then run interviews here.
interview.subtitle: Run a role-based interview that actively samples how you speak, then extract a model update.
interview.noModelWarning: No Self Model yet. The planner still works, but interviews improve most after generating v0.1 in Import.
interview.interviewLanguage: Interview language (the language the interview is conducted in)
interview.goal: Goal (optional — planner derives one if blank)
interview.goalPlaceholder: e.g. how I comfort a close friend who feels like a failure
interview.allTurnsUsed: All planned turns used — extract when ready.
interview.modelCreated: Self Model v{version} created from this interview.

calibration.title: Calibration
calibration.createProjectFirst: Create a project first (see Contexts), then run blind calibration here.
calibration.subtitle: The agent predicts a hidden reply. You write your real one. The system reveals both, shows the differences, and proposes a model update — on accept, a new Self Model version.
calibration.noModelWarning: No Self Model yet. The prediction will be generic until you generate v0.1 (Import) and run interviews.
calibration.scenario: Scenario (optional — the system generates one if blank)
calibration.scenarioPlaceholder: e.g. A close friend says they feel like a failure lately.
calibration.incomingPlaceholder: The exact message you'd be replying to (if separate from the scenario)
calibration.hiddenNote: The agent writes its predicted reply now, but it stays hidden until after you answer.
calibration.blindNote: The agent has already written a hidden prediction. Write what you would really reply — it stays blind until you submit.
calibration.updateValues: Update values (edit before accepting to apply your own version)
calibration.modelCreated: Self Model v{version} created from this calibration.
calibration.invalidJson: Edited values are not valid JSON.

selfModel.title: Self Model
selfModel.createProjectFirst: Create a project first, then import materials to generate a model.
selfModel.noModel: No Self Model yet. Go to Import, add materials, accept extracted evidence, and generate v0.1.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.createProjectFirst: Create a project first (see Contexts), then generate drafts here.
tasks.subtitle: Use the trained Self Model to draft replies, copy, scripts, and emails in the right context. Draft Mode only — nothing is ever sent for you.
tasks.noModelWarning: No Self Model yet — drafts will be generic until you generate v0.1 (Import) and train it.
tasks.inputPlaceholder: e.g. A friend says: I really feel like a failure lately.
tasks.draftsOnly: Drafts only — nothing is ever sent for you.
tasks.noSendReady: No send-ready draft is shown. Write this reply yourself.
tasks.reviewSendYourself: Draft only — review and send it yourself. The system never sends on your behalf.
tasks.saveSample: Save this output as a training sample
tasks.feedbackSavedSample: Feedback saved. Output stored as a training sample.

versions.title: Versions
versions.note: Self Model version history: reason for each update, affected scope, evidence, approval status, and rollback.
